scripts.build: pnpm build:renderer && pnpm build:main && pnpm build:preload
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,main,preload,electron "pnpm dev:renderer" "pnpm dev:main" "pnpm dev:preload" "pnpm dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:3001 file:dist-electron/main/main.mjs file:dist-electron/preload/preload.mjs && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 electron dist-electron/main/main.mjs
